summary: Excellent soundboard recording with distinctive heavy natural reverb and a strong show highlighted by a stellar Wheel entrance and nice Sugar Magnolia segment
review: The three reviewers all praise this September 12 1982 performance, noting the pristine yet heavily reverberant board mix that gives the set a unique, almost “bathroom‑like” ambience. Musical highlights include an inspiring entrance into The Wheel and memorable moments from Sugar Magnolia (and other noted cuts), while the overall mix comes together smoothly for a very enjoyable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are positive (4‑5 stars) and emphasize both strong musical performance and high‑quality soundboard recording; the average rating and consistent praise justify a solid 4½‑star assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Heavy natural reverb from board‑mic placement (Sennheiser mics at the FOH desk) creates a bright, crisp, punchy sound despite the ambience; reviewers describe it as pristine and clean.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a smooth flow with the mix coming together nicely; the heavy reverb adds a unique character but does not detract from the performance, making the set feel cohesive and engaging.
